calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2013 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-10-2012 Continued To Jan-29-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-29-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-29-2011 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-18-12 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for settlement on the record.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields, #7235

Christopher Hart, Esq. present in pro per for the Plaintiff:Schnader, Harrison, Segal & Lewis LLP.
Steven Finley, Esq. for and with the Defendant Marco Herrera dba Global Solutions Bathtub Refinishing.

Case settled, terms were placed on the record as follows: Parties agreed to a stipulated judgment in the amount of $10,000.00 with 12 monthly installments, starting on 10-01-11 and without interest. If defendant default on the agreement, judgment for plaintiff in the amount of $15,000.00 and attorney fees. Defendant agreed to provides the plaintiff with a financial statement and bank account information within 60 days. Parties agreed to terms on the record. Trial date vacted.
Matter is set on the Court's CRC dismissal calendar for Dec. 2012 at 10 a.m. in Dept. 610.
